title: 英検2級 2025年度 第2回 リスニング

source.segmentation: ffmpeg silencedetectで約10秒の解答無音を検出し、各設問ごとのMP3クリップを生成。

lessons.question: What is one thing the man says?
choices: The time of the wedding has been changed.
The wedding plans are not finished yet.
The honeymoon was not enjoyable.
The honeymoon plans were made six weeks ago.
lessons.script:
☆So, how are the wedding preparations going, Gordon? Have you and your fiancée finished
planning everything?
★We've done a lot, but there's still so much left to do.
☆Well, you still have six weeks left. Have you decided where to go on your honeymoon?
★Actually, we've both been so busy that we haven't had time to think about it yet.
☆☆
tips: 短縮形は弱く速く出ます: We've, haven't, there's, we've
第1部は話者の目的と困りごとを先に押さえると、選択肢を絞りやすい。
Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What does the man want to know?
choices: Whether he can move into Apartment 409.
Which moving company he should use.
When he can move into his apartment.
Where he can put the moving truck.
lessons.script:
★Hi. My name is Austin Grant. I'm moving into Apartment 409 tomorrow.
☆Oh, hi. I'm Belinda Davis, the building manager. What can I do for you?
★I'd like to know where I can park. I'm going to rent a moving truck.
☆You should park by the stairs behind the building. That way, it'll be easy for you to move your
things into your apartment.
☆☆
tips: 短縮形は弱く速く出ます: I'd, I'm, it'll
going to は語の切れ目より、ひとまとまりの音で拾う。
数字・時制表現は選択肢の根拠になりやすいので、単語だけでなく周辺表現も確認する。

Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What do we learn about the woman?
choices: She will teach the man to cook chili.
She wants to try chili.
She won a chili-cooking contest.
She is good at making chili.
lessons.script:
☆I saw a TV show about food in the United States yesterday. There was a cooking contest where
people were making a kind of meat-and-bean stew called chili.
★Oh, I love chili. It's a really popular food there. Many people have their own recipes for making
it. I make it sometimes, too.
☆I'd love to try it. I wonder if they sell it in Japan. It looks really good.
★Great. I'll make some for you, then.
☆☆

lessons.question: Why does the man say the woman should hurry?
choices: It is the last day of the exhibition.
It is nearly closing time.
Exhibition tickets will sell out soon.
The museum shop is having a special sale.
lessons.script:
☆Excuse me. Where can I find the special exhibition of modern art?
★It's on the third floor, next to the museum shop. But you'd better hurry. The museum is closing in
half an hour.
☆All right. Do I have to pay extra to go in?
★Yes. Special exhibition tickets are five dollars. It's our most popular event this year.
☆☆

★No, I didn't. I've been taking the bus lately.
☆Why? What's wrong with your car?
★Oh, my car is fine. It's just that gas prices are so high that it's cheaper for me to take the bus.
☆☆

lessons.script:
★Hi. I bought this shirt here a few days ago, but I'd like to exchange it. I hope that's possible.
☆That's fine. What is the problem with it?
★I bought it for my father, but it didn't fit him. Do you have one in a smaller size?
☆Yes, we do. We also have some new styles that just arrived this week. You might want to have a
look at them as well.
☆☆

lessons.question: What does the man tell his daughter?
choices: She should practice acting more.
She should have been in last year's play.
She should find a club she enjoys.
She should remain in the drama club.
lessons.script:
☆Dad, I'm thinking about quitting the drama club at school.
★Why, Leah? I thought you loved the drama club.
☆I do, Dad, but sometimes I don't feel like I'm very good at acting. I always get nervous and
forget my lines. The other members are so much better.
★That's not true—you were great in last year's play. I don't think you should give up on something
you enjoy.
☆☆

lessons.question: What is one thing the man says?
choices: He has several children.
He has not been sleeping much.
He has not found a new house yet.
He has been at his office a lot. Listening Test
lessons.script:
☆Hey, James. I heard your wife just had a baby. Congratulations!
★Thanks, Janice. We're still trying to get used to having a baby around the house. We certainly
don't sleep as much as we used to.
☆Well, I remember when my husband and I had our first child. It's a lot of work at first, but you'll
get used to it.
★Yeah. I'm sure you're right. Thanks for the encouragement.
☆☆

☆That's wonderful! I wish I could go out like that, but it's been raining for the past three days here.

☆Sounds perfect. Gardening had been my dream, but I gave up as we didn't have a garden.

choices: Ask others for help.
Make meetings shorter.
Have meetings online.
Use some technology. Listening Test 第 2部
lessons.script:
☆I noticed that you were taking a lot of notes during the meeting. Do you write down everything?
★Yes, I write down what each person says to make a report after meetings every time.
☆Why don't you record the meetings with your phone? I know some good applications that create
reports automatically.
★Wow, I didn't know that we could do that. I'll certainly use them.
☆☆

lessons.question: What is the announcement mainly about?
choices: Staff members who can help passengers.
The schedule of other trains.
An information board above the platform.
A train that is arriving late.
lessons.script:
★Attention, passengers. The 9:30 train to Kingston will arrive on Platform 3 in five minutes. The
train is usually on time, but this morning it is running late. For the schedule for other trains, please
check the information board above. There are also staff members wearing yellow vests on every
platform who are happy to help you with any questions.
☆☆
tips: 場所・施設名は内容理解の柱です。前置詞とセットで聞き取る。

Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What new hobby has David started?
choices: Painting pictures of landscapes.
Going for walks in the city.
Spending time with his coworkers.
Looking at pictures of landscapes.
lessons.script:
★David is a retired doctor. He used to spend most of his time at work, so he did not have many
hobbies. Now that he has retired, he has taken up a new hobby. He has started painting. His wife
often goes for walks in the countryside, and David has begun going with her. While she walks, he
sits and paints pictures of the beautiful landscapes.
☆☆

lessons.script:

workout, Tom's arms felt sore. He asked his friend Carla for advice. She told him that he should not
lift heavy weights all of a sudden because it can cause injuries. Instead, he should gradually increase
the weights he lifts. Tom will follow her advice from now on.

lessons.question: How did Wall Street get its name?
choices: It was mistaken for a Dutch word.
It was originally next to a wall.
It was named after a town in Holland.
It was built by the Wall family.
lessons.script:
☆Today, Wall Street in New York is home to some of the most famous banks and financial
companies in the world. However, its name has an interesting history. In the 1600s, New York
belonged to Holland. The Dutch people there were afraid of being attacked, so they built a long wall
for protection. There was a street beside this wall, so people began to call it Wall Street.
☆☆
tips: 場所・施設名は内容理解の柱です。前置詞とセットで聞き取る。
数字・時制表現は選択肢の根拠になりやすいので、単語だけでなく周辺表現も確認する。
第2部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。
Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What is being announced?
choices: A train with only standard-class cars.
A train that will depart in ten minutes.
A train that is boarding at Platform 1.
An express train to Hargate.
lessons.script:
☆Attention, passengers. The 11:05 express train to Hargate is now ready for boarding at Platform 2.
This train has first-class and standard-class seats. The first-class seats are located in cars one, two,
and three. Please have your ticket ready to show to the conductor. The train will depart in five
minutes. Thank you for traveling with us today. Enjoy your trip to Hargate.
☆☆
tips: 場所・施設名は内容理解の柱です。前置詞とセットで聞き取る。

Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What is the problem with the flight to Paris?
choices: The plane has not yet arrived.
There are not enough snacks for passengers.
The flight will not leave from Paris.
The weather in Paris is not safe.
lessons.script:
☆Attention, passengers. We would like to apologize for the delay of our flight to Paris. The plane
has arrived, but the weather conditions at the airport are not safe for landing. The flight will be
delayed until it is safe to land. Passengers on this flight will receive free snacks and drinks while we
are waiting. Thank you for your patience.
☆☆
tips: would like to は語の切れ目より、ひとまとまりの音で拾う。

lessons.question: What must passengers do before landing?
choices: Use their mobile phones.
Collect all of their bags.
Confirm their baggage area.
Put their seats upright.
lessons.script:
☆Welcome to Air Star Flight 237 to Newland. We will be landing soon. Please make sure your seat
is upright and your seat belt is fastened. If you would like to use your mobile phone, please wait
until we have landed. Once we land, you can collect your baggage at the baggage claim area. Thank
you for flying with Air Star.
☆☆
